features: Award-Winning Formula: Enhances health and wellbeing, celebrated globally.
Light Whipped Cream: Absorbs quickly, non-greasy, leaving skin soft and smooth.
Exquisite Fragrance: A transporting scent that offers a sensory escape.
Paraben-Free: Safe and gentle for all skin types.
Eco-Friendly Packaging: Reusable bottle and optional refill pouch for sustainable skincare.
description: Product description Experience the luxury of Indian Mulberry Hand Lotion, and award-winning product celebrated for enhancing health and wellbeing. Loved by users around the world, this light whipped cream absorbs quickly into your skin, leaving it irresistibly soft and beautifully fragrant. Our hand lotion is designed to provide deep hydration with a silky texture that never feels greasy, the exquisite fragrance transports you to a serene place, offering a moment of tranquillity every time you use it. Free from harmful parabens, our hand lotion is gentle and safe for all skin types. We are committed to sustainability, which is why our lotion comes in an eco-friendly, reusable bottle. Pamper your hands while caring for the planet. Safety Warning For external use only. Avoid contact with eyes. Keep away from direct heat sources.
